# subreg_dns_record (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `content` (String) Record value (IP, hostname, or text value).
- `domain` (String) Registered domain that owns the record.
- `name` (String) Record name without the registered domain (e.g. @, www).
- `type` (String) DNS record type (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.).

### Optional

- `prio` (Number) Priority for MX records.
- `ttl` (Number) TTL for the record in seconds.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
